title: Cart and checkout state
description: A cart progresses through mutable, reserved, and paying stages, each with distinct stock and price guarantees.
body: Use when reasoning about what a cart guarantees at each stage. A mutable cart makes no stock or price promise; a reserved cart holds inventory for a bounded window; a paying cart locks the server-computed total. Do not assume a price shown in a mutable cart still holds at payment. Actions: re-validate stock and recompute totals server-side when transitioning to paying. Validation signals include the charged total matching the server computation and stock confirmed at payment. Risk boundary: a reservation may expire mid-checkout, so re-reserve atomically rather than trusting the earlier hold.
